acceptance_criteria:
1. format field removed from FieldSpec
2. style, renderer, render_settings fields added
3. FieldRendererSpec enum defined
4. FieldRenderSettings struct defined
5. #[format] in Signature derive causes clear compile error
6. Error message explains migration to #[render]
7. All existing uses of format updated or removed
8. cargo check passes
description:
Remove the deprecated #[format] attribute from FieldSpec. Anyone using it should get a clear compile error with migration instructions.

Location: crates/dspy-rs/src/core/signature.rs

Current FieldSpec:
```rust
pub struct FieldSpec {
    pub name: &'static str,
    pub rust_name: &'static str,
    pub description: &'static str,
    pub type_ir: fn() -> TypeIR,
    pub constraints: &'static [ConstraintSpec],
    pub format: Option<&'static str>,  // TO BE DELETED
}
```

New FieldSpec (format removed, render fields added):
```rust
pub struct FieldSpec {
    pub name: &'static str,
    pub rust_name: &'static str,
    pub description: &'static str,
    pub type_ir: fn() -> TypeIR,
    pub constraints: &'static [ConstraintSpec],
    // format: REMOVED - use #[render(...)] instead
    pub style: Option<&'static str>,
    pub renderer: Option<FieldRendererSpec>,
    pub render_settings: Option<FieldRenderSettings>,
}

pub enum FieldRendererSpec {
    Jinja { template: &'static str },
    Func { f: fn(&PromptValue, &RenderSession) -> RenderResult },
}

pub struct FieldRenderSettings {
    pub max_string_chars: Option<usize>,
    pub max_list_items: Option<usize>,
    pub max_map_entries: Option<usize>,
    pub max_depth: Option<usize>,
}
```

Location: crates/dsrs-macros/src/lib.rs

In the Signature derive macro, error on #[format]:
```rust
if has_format_attr {
    return Err(syn::Error::new(
        attr.span(),
        "#[format] is removed. Use #[render(style = \"...\")] instead."
    ));
}
```
title: Remove #[format] from FieldSpec with migration error
